title: hieracium bifidum subsp. capnotrichum
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. capnotrichum, a subspecies of the hawkweed plant, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Hieracium bifidum subsp. capnotrichum include its use in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant also include its ability to act as an antioxidant and anti-bacterial agent, which can help to boost the immune system and prevent infections. Hieracium bifidum subsp. capnotrichum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
